name: Jill O'Brien
about: 4 years at Prada and Miu Miu in flagship locations. Strong luxury background but new to the Reflex platform. References available from previous employers.
interviewTranscript: As far as my retail or customer service experience, I've done a number of different things. Back in high school and college, I worked in retail a lot—Victoria's Secret, the Gap, those types of things. I waitressed throughout college as well and grad school. My master's is in psychology and I ended up using that to go into marketing and really focus on the consumer experience and behavior and building those client relationships. So I was mainly on the client service side. I was VP of client service at an agency and it's really important to me to build those relationships. I love to travel all over the world and just talk to people and get to know them and it's really important as far as the marketing part of me as well to make sure that the client and the end user, the consumer—I'm a consumer too, so I understand what good and bad experiences are. Making sure that communication is clear and that they have a good visit to the store.
